claims.statement: Appalachian Trail length is at least 2× larger than Panama Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Appalachian Trail length: 3500 km. Panama Canal length: 82 km.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in air (~20°C) is slower than Category 5 hurricane threshold.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h. Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h.

claims.statement: Suez Canal length is shorter than Great Wall of China length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Suez Canal length: 193 km. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer strings on a violin than squares on a chessboard.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 4 strings vs 64 squares.

claims.statement: Penicillin discovered happened before First powered flight.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Penicillin discovered: 1928. First powered flight: 1903.
